title: lepisorus mucronatus var. durus
intro: Lepisorus mucronatus var. durus, also known as a type of fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lepisorus mucronatus var. durus include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
